context: A psychometric instrument assessing civilian sentiment in Nazi Germany during 1943, a critical turning point in World War II. By this year, the tide of war had begun to shift against Germany following defeats at Stalingrad and North Africa, and the Allied bombing campaign was intensifying. This survey captures the attitudes of ordinary German civilians toward the Nazi regime, the war effort, personal sacrifice, and their hopes for the future during a period of mounting hardship and uncertainty.

questions.preprompt: A trusted neighbor asks {player_name} in confidence how much they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} believes that the Führer and the Nazi leadership are doing what is best for Germany's future.

questions.preprompt: A trusted neighbor asks {player_name} in confidence how much they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} feels proud to be part of the German nation under current leadership.

questions.preprompt: A trusted neighbor asks {player_name} in confidence how much they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} has serious doubts about whether the Nazi regime's promises and explanations are truthful.

questions.preprompt: Reflecting on the current state of the war, {player_name} is asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} is confident that Germany will ultimately achieve victory in this war.

questions.preprompt: Reflecting on the current state of the war, {player_name} is asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} believes that the sacrifices being asked of German civilians are necessary and justified for the nation's survival.

questions.preprompt: Reflecting on the current state of the war, {player_name} is asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} is losing hope that this war will end in a way that makes the suffering worthwhile.

questions.preprompt: When considering their own daily life and circumstances, {player_name} is asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} feels that their family has suffered greatly due to food rationing, bombing raids, and the demands of war.

questions.preprompt: When considering their own daily life and circumstances, {player_name} is asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} resents how the government prioritizes military needs over the welfare of ordinary families like theirs.

questions.preprompt: When considering their own daily life and circumstances, {player_name} is asked to what extent they agree or disagree with the following statement:
questions.statement: {player_name} believes that the hardships their family endures are temporary and will be rewarded once peace is achieved.
